retrieved_result: What does Fowler mean? What does Fowler mean? Fowler as a boys' name is of Old English origin, and the meaning of Fowler is bird trapper. Occupational name. Also form of Falco. ENDS WITH -er ASSOCIATED WITH old english, bird, trapper (hunter), occupational Variations CREATIVE FORMS (male) (female)MIDDLE NAME PAIRINGS
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the meaning of the name Fowler, not about easy DIY room decoration ideas.
